# Generated by docs-init — review and customize before use
# Generic rules: see hd-security-review/SECURITY_STANDARDS.md in your Claude skills directory (~/.claude/skills/hd-security-review/SECURITY_STANDARDS.md)

applicable_compliance:
  - PCI-DSS   # payment data
  - ISO-27001  # user accounts
  - NĐ-13-2023 # Vietnamese users (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân)

project_rules:
  pii_fields:
    - email
    - firstName
    - lastName
    - role
    - accessToken (localStorage)
    - refreshToken (localStorage)

  payment_data:
    - orderId
    - paymentAmount
    - transactionId
    - refundAmount

  token_storage:
    policy: "JWT stored in localStorage — consider HttpOnly cookie migration for production"
    risk: medium

  sensitive_endpoints:
    - /admin/payments
    - /admin/orders
    - /auth/login
    - /auth/refresh-token
    - /upload
